title: Legends Moss
description: Legends Moss is a resource pack that replaces the default Moss block texture with the design from Minecraft Legends for a fresh, legendary look.
body:
Legends Moss is a resource pack that replaces the default texture of the block Moss with the iconic design from Minecraft Legends. This pack brings the vibrant and stylized look of Minecraft Legends to your game, giving the block a fresh, legendary appearance. Perfect for players looking to mix classic Minecraft gameplay with the unique aesthetic of Minecraft Legends.

***

## **Support the work**

If you enjoy what I create, supporting the page helps me spend more time on updates, polishing features, fixing issues, and creating new content for future releases.

Every bit of support helps keep development going — thank you for making the next update possible.
